name: Plain markdown prose
accessibility_concerns: reading-level + heading hierarchy + alt-text on images
notes: The default output type for canonical SOPs / decision-log narratives / planning markdown / scratchpads. SSOT for content; renders to web (GitHub UI) or PDF (via render_dossier.py) or mail (via render_cover_email.py).

name: Rich HTML email body
authoring_tool: markdown source plus mail render pipeline
accessibility_concerns: reader-platform compatibility (Outlook / Gmail / iOS Mail) + dark-mode + screen-reader
brand_visual_anchor: brand visual identity (logo + colors per BRAND_BASELINE_REALITY_MATRIX.md)
notes: Mail body shape distinct from OT-PROSE-MARKDOWN because it carries inline visual primitives (logo / signature image / inline CSS). Renders via render_cover_email.py.

name: Direct message prose
accessibility_concerns: length budget + reading order + emoji policy
brand_visual_anchor: brand-voice register simplified for conversational channel
notes: Conversational channel-bound prose. Different rules from email (no formal greeting + brief body + CTA-first or qualifying-question-first per channel doctrine).

name: Presentation slide deck
accessibility_concerns: reading order + AAA contrast on text + alt-text on graphics
brand_visual_anchor: brand visual identity (16:9 aspect; brand grid; type scale; color palette)
notes: 16:9 default aspect; ranges from 4-slide advisor pack to 14-slide founding deck. Authored as deck_*.md narrative + Figma frame source per FIGMA_FILES_REGISTRY.csv.

name: Raster image (PNG / JPEG / GIF)
accessibility_concerns: alt-text + visible-only content + AAA contrast for embedded text
brand_visual_anchor: brand visual identity (color palette + crop ratios + treatment style)
notes: Photographic / photographic-style assets. Brand assets live under _assets/<plane>/; engagement-specific raster lives under engagement folders.

name: Vector image (SVG)
brand_visual_anchor: brand visual identity (line-weight + color palette + corner-radius)
notes: Logos / icons / illustrations as scalable vector. Preferred over raster for any asset that scales beyond 1x.

name: Mermaid diagram
accessibility_concerns: reading order via accessible attributes + AAA contrast + alt-text equivalent in surrounding prose
brand_visual_anchor: brand visual identity (theme colors via mermaid theme variables)
notes: Source-of-truth as .mmd file under docs/references/hlk/v3.0/_assets/<plane>/<program>/<topic>/. Per akos-planning-traceability.mdc .mmd-first P0 rule. Renders via scripts/render_km_diagrams.py.

name: Excalidraw drawing
accessibility_concerns: reading order via descriptive prose + AAA contrast + alt-text equivalent
brand_visual_anchor: brand visual identity (sketch-style; subdued palette per Excalidraw default)
notes: Hand-drawn-feel diagrams for whiteboarding / architecture sketches. Source-of-truth as .excalidraw JSON file. Differs from OT-DIAGRAM-MERMAID by intent: Excalidraw for ideation / Mermaid for canonical structure.

name: Gantt chart (timeline)
accessibility_concerns: reading order via accessible label table + AAA contrast
brand_visual_anchor: brand visual identity (color palette + bar treatment)
notes: Phase-dependency timeline. Mermaid gantt is the v1 default per akos-planning-traceability.mdc plan-quality bar.

name: Data chart (bar / line / scatter / pie)
accessibility_concerns: reading order via data table fallback + AAA contrast + alt-text equivalent
brand_visual_anchor: brand visual identity (color palette + data-ink ratio per Tufte)
notes: Quantitative visualisations for funnel / cohort / engagement metrics. Per akos-quality-fabric.mdc Canvas-skill rule: charts that are the deliverable (not narrative-illustration) live as JSON-driven canvas components.

name: CSV table raw
accessibility_concerns: row count budget + column header clarity + machine-parseability
brand_visual_anchor: n/a (raw data; brand applies at render layer)
notes: Canonical CSVs (process_list / baseline_organisation / dimensions/*.csv) live here. Render to OT-TABLE-RENDERED for human consumption.

name: Rendered HTML or PDF table
accessibility_concerns: sortable headers + row striping for scan + AAA contrast + screen-reader semantics
brand_visual_anchor: brand visual identity (border treatment + header styling + alternating-row tint)
notes: Human-facing presentation of OT-TABLE-CSV-RAW data. ERP planning panel renders this for governance.planning_decisions_view + governance.planning_ops_view.

name: Video
accessibility_concerns: captions (FCC standard) + audio descriptions + transcript + keyboard nav controls
brand_visual_anchor: brand visual identity (intro/outro card + lower-third + color grade)
notes: Future channel: founder explainer videos / engagement walkthrough recordings / KiRBe demo loops. Activates when first video deliverable is authored.

name: Voice audio (TTS or human narration)
accessibility_concerns: transcript + audio description for non-speech sounds + speech-rate control
brand_visual_anchor: brand voice register (per BRAND_DO_DONT.md voice traits) + cadence + tone
notes: For agent rendering (Madeira voice intros) + accessibility alternative to text. TTS-first at v1 per I-NN-OUTPUT-ARCHITECTURE C-NN-3 default. Founder voice memo as alternate authoring path.

name: Web page rendered HTML
accessibility_concerns: WCAG 2.2 AA: keyboard nav + screen reader + color contrast + focus-visible + reflow at zoom + reduced-motion
brand_visual_anchor: brand visual identity (full design system via Tailwind + Radix UI primitives + theme tokens)
notes: The most complex output type: combines prose + visual + interactive. Renders to RENDER_SURFACE web. Subject to Core Web Vitals performance bar.

name: Web form (interactive intake)
authoring_tool: Next.js form components;Radix UI;React Hook Form
accessibility_concerns: WCAG 2.2 AA: labels + error messages + keyboard nav + focus order + autocomplete + screen reader form roles
brand_visual_anchor: brand visual identity (form spacing + input style + button treatment)
notes: Web form is a sub-class of OT-WEB-PAGE with form-specific accessibility + UX rules. Holistikaresearch.com /contact form is an instance.

name: PDF document
accessibility_concerns: tagged PDF + reading order + alt-text + screen-reader compatibility (PDF/UA)
brand_visual_anchor: brand visual identity (typography + page treatment + cover style + footer style)
notes: Sealed deliverable for J-IN / J-ENISA / J-AD / J-CU. Renders via render_dossier.py + render_uat_dossier.py + render_suez_engagement_pdfs.py + export_company_deck_pdf.py + export_adviser_handoff.py. Carries sha256 manifest sidecar per akos-external-render-discipline.mdc RULE 3.
